title: Date-A-Package-Manager Dialog
description: A dialog object, consisting of a line, attitude, options and relationship things.

line.description: The line that a character is going to say.

attitude.description: How the character is feeling when saying the dialog.

affectsRelationship.description: Whether or not the relationship status should be affected by this dialog, which will be based on the attitude property.

options.description: The options that a player can take.

tone.description: The tone of the option, characters will respond as needed.
